results.title: Dnd Kit Sortable Tree
results.description: A sortable tree component extracted and abstracted from dndkit examples, allowing customizable tree structures with drag-and-drop functionality.

results.title: @dnd-kit
results.description: A lightweight, modular, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit for React. It offers hooks like useDraggable and useDroppable, supports multiple input methods, and is highly customizable.

results.title: Dnd Kit
results.description: dnd kit is a modern, feature-packed, and extensible drag and drop toolkit for React, offering customizable collision detection, multiple input methods, and accessibility support.

results.title: dnd-kit-solid
results.description: dnd-kit-solid is a modern, lightweight, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit that brings the power of dnd-kit to SolidJS applications with the same great API and features.

results.title: Dnd Kit Svelte
results.description: A Svelte port of the dnd-kit library, offering a modern, lightweight, performant, accessible, and extensible drag & drop toolkit for Svelte applications.

results.title: Dnd Kit
results.description: Dnd Kit is a library for building drag and drop interfaces with support for React and Vanilla JavaScript, offering extensibility through plugins, sensors, and modifiers.

results.title: Ember Sortable
results.description: Ember Sortable provides sortable UI primitives for Ember applications, allowing users to reorder items within lists and groups with customizable drag-and-drop behavior.

results.title: Vue DnD Kit
results.description: A modern, lightweight, and high-performance drag and drop library for Vue 3 applications, offering composable APIs, TypeScript support, and accessibility features.

results.title: Dioxus Sortable
results.description: Dioxus Sortable provides sortable table components and other sortable elements for Dioxus applications.

results.title: Solid DnD
results.description: A lightweight, performant, extensible drag and drop toolkit for Solid JS.

results.title: Draggable
results.description: Draggable abstracts native browser events into a comprehensive API to create custom drag and drop experiences, with additional modules for sorting, dropping, and swapping.

results.title: Dnd
results.description: Beautiful and accessible drag and drop for lists with React, offering natural movement, powerful keyboard and screen reader support, and high performance.

results.title: React Native Sortables
results.description: React Native Sortables is a library providing powerful and flexible sortable components for reordering content in React Native applications using intuitive dragging gestures.

results.title: Lexorank Sortable
results.description: A Laravel package that provides sortable behavior to Eloquent models using lexorank-style positioning, supporting single models, grouped sorts, and many-to-many relationships.

results.title: Svelte Sortable List
results.description: A comprehensive Svelte package for creating accessible, sortable lists with multi-input support, flexible layouts, enhanced UX, advanced options, and internationalization.

results.title: FormKit Drag And Drop
results.description: FormKit's Drag and Drop is a lightweight, framework-agnostic library for implementing data-first drag and drop sorting and transferring for lists, weighing in at approximately 4Kb gzipped.

results.title: Livewire Sortablejs
results.description: A Livewire plugin that wraps Sortable.js for enhanced drag-and-drop functionality, offering better compatibility with Alpine.js than the default Livewire sortable package.

results.title: Moveable
results.description: Moveable is a versatile JavaScript library that enables draggable, resizable, scalable, rotatable, warpable, pinchable, groupable, and snappable functionalities for web elements.

results.title: Reorderable
results.description: Reorderable is a library for Jetpack Compose and Compose Multiplatform that enables drag-and-drop reordering of items in various Lazy layouts and basic Columns/Rows.

results.title: Moveable
results.description: Moveable is a powerful JavaScript library that enables drag, resize, scale, rotate, warp, pinch, group, snap, clip, and round functionality for DOM elements. It supports SVG elements and offers extensive customization options.

results.title: Vue 3 Sortable
results.description: A Vue 3 directive-based wrapper for SortableJS, enabling re-orderable drag-and-drop lists with a lightweight and maintainable approach.

results.title: Vue Draggable Plus
results.description: Vue Draggable Plus is a drag-and-drop sorting module for Vue.js, supporting Vue 3 and Vue 2.7, offering component, function, and directive usage based on Sortablejs.

results.title: Livewire Sortable
results.description: A plugin to bring drag/sort capability to Livewire

results.title: Sortable
results.description: SortableJS is a JavaScript library for creating reorderable drag-and-drop lists with CSS animations, touch support, and integration with various frameworks.

results.title: dnd-timeline
results.description: dnd-timeline is a headless, hook-based timeline library built on dnd-kit, offering flexible, performant, and touch-supported drag-and-drop functionality for creating interactive timelines with zero styling.

results.title: Vue Draggable Next
results.description: Vue Draggable Next is a Vue 3 drag-and-drop component based on Sortable.js, offering touch-friendly support, TypeScript definitions, and comprehensive Sortable.js options.

results.title: Multi Reorderable
results.description: Multi Reorderable is a powerful and customizable Flutter widget for multi-selection and animated reordering of items, supporting features like drag & drop, animated stacking, and extensive theming.

results.title: React Easy Sort
results.description: A React component for easily sorting items in lists or grids with drag and drop functionality, featuring mobile-friendliness and IE11 support.

results.title: Rockable
results.description: Rockable is an academic C++ Discrete Element Method (DEM) code designed to model complex systems with sphero-polyhedral shapes and manage breakable interfaces, facilitating integration with other computational codes.

results.title: Vue Draggable Next
results.description: Vue.js 3.0 component for drag-and-drop functionality, synchronizing with the view model array and built upon Sortable.js.
